final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing educational infographic illustrating definitions and relationships among 7 concepts: AI、MCP、AI Agent、OpenClaw、AI Skill、蒸馏、CLI.

Style/medium: needs a "手绘风格" aesthetic — references in the spirit of Sketchnotes visual note-taking tradition, RSA Animate whiteboard illustration style, 2010s tech explainer hand-drawn infographic zine culture; exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must include all 7 concept nodes with connecting lines or arrows showing relationships between them, laid out as a concept map or relationship diagram
Subject: must include all 7 concepts with short definition labels and relationship annotations:
  AI — artificial intelligence, the foundational concept
  MCP — model context protocol, connects AI to tools/data
  AI Agent — autonomous AI that acts using skills and tools
  OpenClaw — an AI-related platform or framework
  AI Skill — a discrete capability unit used by AI Agents
  蒸馏 — knowledge distillation, compressing model knowledge
  CLI — command-line interface, a text-based interaction layer
Scene/backdrop: light paper or whiteboard texture background
Lighting/mood: friendly, approachable, educational tone — clear and easy to understand
Color palette: needs a soft, readable palette — exact color choices are yours
Materials/textures: hand-drawn ink lines, sketch hatching, doodle-style icons alongside each concept node
Text (verbatim): must include concept labels verbatim: "AI", "MCP", "AI Agent", "OpenClaw", "AI Skill", "蒸馏", "CLI"
Constraints: all 7 concepts must be visible and legible; relationships between concepts must be visually indicated
Avoid: overly dense or cluttered layout, dark or heavy backgrounds, purely abstract decoration with no explanatory content
